name: Compartment Workflow Mandate
description: DAG workflow mandate starbridge-app: step cursor (MonotonicSequence), immutable commitment anchor, clearance-label admission, and Stingray spend-policy demo. Maps Lean CompartmentWorkflowMandate theorems to Rust slot caveats and predicate-layer admission checks.

deos.mount: register_deos (src/lib.rs) — folds the composed DeosApp into the StarbridgeAppContext affordance registry; DeosApp::mount yields the axum router
deos.publish: Signature (the mandate cell is a dregg:// sturdyref an auditor on another federation reacquires)

affordances.view_workflow: cap-only, Signature (an OBSERVER reads the charter cursor)
affordances.advance_step: GATED (cap∧state), None/operator — not-at-terminal precondition (STEP_CURSOR < CHARTER_TERMINAL); the fire submits the FULL advance (cursor + step-advanced event) reading the live cursor, the executor re-enforcing MonotonicSequence(STEP_CURSOR) (exact +1) AND FieldLteField(STEP_CURSOR <= CHARTER_TERMINAL)

deos.seam: CLOSED — the fire runs against the seeded mandate cell carrying the workflow program (WriteOnce charter-config slots + FieldLteField(STEP_CURSOR<=CHARTER_TERMINAL) + advance_step-scoped MonotonicSequence(STEP_CURSOR)), so a SKIPPED/REPEATED step (non-+1) and a PAST-TERMINAL advance BITE in the deos fire path (tests/deos_seam.rs)
